---
title: "BoundaryObjective"
generated: true
description: "The BBR cost packaged as an [`Objective`](../nitrix-register/Objective.qmd) (with no fixed image)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.register`](../nitrix-register.qmd)

*Re-exported here; defined in `nitrix.register._bbr`.*

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BoundaryObjective -->
```python
class BoundaryObjective
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:BoundaryObjective -->
The BBR cost packaged as an [`Objective`](../nitrix-register/Objective.qmd) (with no fixed image).

Closes over the moving image, the boundary points and normals, and the
sampling configuration; `cost` evaluates [`bbr_cost`](../nitrix-register/bbr_cost.qmd) at the
given parameters.  This is not a least-squares objective (the
$\tanh$ cost is not a sum of squares), so `is_least_squares`
is `False` and `residual` raises.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

### Methods

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BoundaryObjective.cost -->
```python
cost(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, '']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Boundary cost at the rigid parameters `params`.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BoundaryObjective.residual -->
```python
residual(params: Float[Array, ' p']) -> Float[Array, ' m']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

Not defined for the BBR objective.

The boundary cost is not a sum of squares, so it has no residual
vector.  This method always raises `NotImplementedError`.

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:BoundaryObjective.__init__ -->
```python
__init__(moving: Float[Array, '*spatial'], points: Float[Array, ' n d'], normals: Float[Array, ' n d'], moving_affine_inv: Float[Array, ' d1 d1'], model: TransformModel, ndim: int, step: float, slope: float, q0: float, method: Interpolator, mode: BoundaryMode, cval: float, eps: float) -> None
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:BoundaryObjective -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `p` | fixed-effect coefficients / design-matrix columns |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
| `n` | query points, each an `ndim`-vector coordinate (variadic) |
| `d` | spatial dimension (2 or 3) |
| `d1` | *(undocumented — add to `_dimensions.yml`)* |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
